title: firefly fireflies
description: Minecraft 1.21.5 Fireflies... as Firefly from Honkai: Star Rail
body:
I replaced the firefly texture with Firefly from Honkai: Star Rail. it's that simple chat

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tcVSe2yyxsw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Trivia: Due to the way the firefly texture functions, the file's resolution is 1080x1080, which is why the pack is marked as 512x512+... but it's more like 256x256, there's just a lot of dead space on the texture file. The original that Minecraft uses is 8x8, for a 1x1 texture.😊
